title: Lennox International Inc. (LII) Q3 2022 Earnings Call Transcript
text: Lennox International Inc. (NYSE:LII ) Q3 2022 Earnings Conference Call October 27, 2022 9:30 AM ET Corporate Participants Steve Harrison - Vice President, Investor Relations Alok Maskara - Chief Executive Officer Joe Reitmeier - Chief Financial Officer Conference Call Participants Gautam Khanna - Cowen Jeff Hammond - KeyBanc Nicole DeBlase - Deutsche Bank Julian Mitchell - Barclays Jeff Sprague - Vertical Research Ryan Merkel - William Blair Tommy Moll - Stephens Inc. Joe O'Dea - Wells Fargo Josh Pokrzywinski - Morgan Stanley Steve Tusa - JPMorgan Nigel Coe - Wolfe Research Joe Ritchie - Goldman Sachs Operator Ladies and gentlemen, thank you for standing by. Welcome to the Lennox International's Third Quarter Earnings Conference Call.
